summary_text: As of 2026-04-28 23:03 UTC, the recent Canada earthquake dataset contains 549 events from the current rolling window. In the last 24 hours, 11 events were recorded, including 0 in the last hour. The largest event in the last 24 hours was M4.15 at 75 km W of Burwash Landing, YT/75 km O de Burwash Landing, YT. The deepest event reached 30.00 km at 84 km SSW of Houpsitas 6, BC/84 km SSO de Houpsitas 6, BC. The most recent listed event was M3.16 at Blast, 16 km E of Hinton, AB/Dynamitage, 16 km E de Hinton, AB at 2026-04-28T21:22:36.000Z. There were 2 events of magnitude 3 or greater and 1 of magnitude 4 or greater in the last 24 hours. The most active regions were YT (5) and BC (4).
